config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society is important, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because once the group is always prioritized, abuse becomes too easy. In my view, a healthy society is built by protecting people’s dignity, freedom, and safety, not by sacrificing them for a vague collective good. Society should only override individual rights in limited cases, with clear laws and strong justification.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang Amerika, itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu seperti kebebasan berbicara, kebebasan beragama, dan perlindungan hukum justru menjadi dasar agar masyarakat tetap adil dan pemerintah tidak sewenang-wenang. Tapi saya juga tidak setuju bahwa hak individu itu absolut tanpa batas; saat ada ancaman nyata seperti kekerasan, penyakit menular, atau keselamatan publik, masyarakat memang bisa membatasi hak tertentu. Yang penting, pembatasan itu harus sempit, transparan, dan bisa diuji, bukan sekadar klaim bahwa “demi kepentingan umum” lalu semua hak bisa disingkirkan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically outrank individual rights, because that is exactly how abuse gets normalized. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how appeals to "the public good" can be used to pressure people into silence or obedience, so I am wary of giving the collective a blank check. At the same time, I do not believe rights are absolute in every situation; during real threats like disease outbreaks or public safety emergencies, some limits are necessary. But those limits must be narrow, lawful, and accountable, otherwise "society first" becomes an excuse for weak protections and unfair treatment.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu jika dimaknai bahwa kepentingan masyarakat selalu lebih penting daripada hak individu. Dari sudut pandang Amerika, justru hak individu adalah pagar utama agar negara atau mayoritas tidak mudah memakai alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” untuk melanggar kebebasan orang. Saya setuju bahwa ada keadaan darurat yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan tertentu, seperti wabah atau ancaman kekerasan, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sangat terbatas dan bisa diuji secara hukum. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi dalih untuk penyalahgunaan kekuasaan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement as written, because in Indonesia I have seen how “for the good of society” can be used to pressure people into silence, conformity, or unfair treatment. Society matters, but it is not a blank check to override dignity, freedom, and legal protection whenever the majority wants it. I do not believe individual rights should be absolute in every case, because emergencies like disease outbreaks or violence can justify limited restrictions, but those limits must be narrow, lawful, and accountable. Without that, “society first” becomes an easy excuse for abuse rather than a real public good.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu jika dimaknai bahwa kepentingan masyarakat selalu harus mengalahkan hak individu. Dari perspektif Amerika, hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu dasar agar mayoritas dan pemerintah tidak seenaknya memakai alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” untuk menekan orang. Saya juga tidak setuju bahwa hak individu harus absolut tanpa batas, karena dalam keadaan darurat seperti wabah atau ancaman kekerasan, pembatasan tertentu memang bisa sah. Tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji secara hukum, kalau tidak, dalih kepentingan masyarakat terlalu mudah berubah menjadi penyalahgunaan kekuasaan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
